title: Paddle shift switch (downshift) will not downshift in D or S position (vehicles equipped with paddle shift switch).

crossRefs.label: Inspect paddle shift switch- (shift down) circuit.

blocks.text: Paddle shift switch (downshift) will not downshift in D or S position (vehicles equipped with paddle shift switch).

items.text: Inspect paddle shift switch- (shift down) circuit. do

refs.label: Inspect paddle shift switch- (shift down) circuit.

items.text: Disconnection or short circuit of the cord between the paddle shift switch - (shift down) and the PGM-FI ECU
Disconnection or poor grounding of the cord between the paddle shift switch (shift down) and ground.
